sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented; tank simulation paradigm suggests pixel-based movement

special_mechanics.name: Tank Movement & Hull-Down Positioning
special_mechanics.description: Vehicle-based movement with terrain-dependent physics. Hull-down strategy emphasizes tactical positioning behind terrain features for defensive advantage.

special_mechanics.name: Multiple Viewpoint Systems
special_mechanics.description: External third-person view can track objects (vehicles, missiles, tank rounds) and follow supporting units for reconnaissance purposes.

tier_notes: Tier 3 (T3): Empirical/qualitative data only. M1 Tank Platoon is a tank warfare simulation paradigm, not a character platformer. No documented sub-pixel systems, gravity values, or jump mechanics. Movement controlled through vehicles (M1 Abrams tanks) with tactical/strategic positioning emphasized over precise physics parameters. Documentation focuses on gameplay systems, not low-level physics values.
